evidence: compare latest-alpha-cli...main: status diverged, main ahead 10 and behind 1
main-only paths include protocol permissions, config schema and layering, multi-agent handlers, dynamic skill selection, compaction tests, MCP tests, and sandbox policy
compare main...latest-alpha-cli: status diverged, alpha ahead 1 and behind 10

critical.title: Instruction and skill-selection surface changed
critical.summary: Main changes dynamic skill selection and removes an implicit-invocation test surface.
critical.localContractImpact: Review instruction-chain, skill namespace, discovery, and invocation contracts before adoption.

critical.title: Permission and sandbox surfaces changed
critical.summary: Main changes protocol permissions, app-server schemas, config locking, sandbox transforms, and MCP tests.
critical.localContractImpact: Review authorization, approval, sandbox, and MCP lifecycle contracts before propagation.

high.title: Multi-agent lifecycle surface changed
high.summary: Main changes agent roles, jobs, spawn handlers, tool specs, environment waiting, and notifications.
high.localContractImpact: Agent message envelope and lifecycle contracts may require updates.

high.title: Configuration and context surfaces changed
high.summary: Main changes config parsing, aliases, schema, environment and turn context, and compaction tests.
high.localContractImpact: Configuration layering, context injection, and compaction contracts require comparison.

notes.title: Main and alpha refs are divergent
notes.summary: Alpha is one commit ahead and ten behind main; preserve independent baselines.
notes.localContractImpact: Do not infer alpha state from main or main state from alpha.
